name: SoundThinking, Inc.
description: SoundThinking, Inc. is a public safety technology company that provides data-driven solutions and strategic advisory services for law enforcement, security teams, and civic leadership. Headquartered in the United States, the company focuses on delivering AI-enabled tools designed to improve public safety outcomes and operational efficiency. Their portfolio includes integrated platforms that help agencies respond more effectively to incidents, manage resources, and foster community trust through actionable intelligence and advanced technology solutions. SoundThinking is publicly traded on the NASDAQ under the ticker symbol SSTI.
